summary: The remaining transport-factory contradiction is resolved and the prior four blocking issues remain fixed, with no new truly blocking problems introduced.

previous_issues_status.original_issue: Ambiguous Goodhart control-flow across disabled/shadow/enabled and failure states ("called on every routing decision" vs graceful degradation)
previous_issues_status.notes: The 4-state routing table (disabled/shadow/enabled/init_failed) is still present and consistent with AC2/AC4/AC5, so invocation vs usage and failure fallback remain unambiguous and testable.

previous_issues_status.original_issue: ECS staging host-based routing may be impossible without explicit HTTPS listener + ACM cert coverage + Route53 record type
previous_issues_status.notes: FR-4 still explicitly requires an HTTPS 443 listener rule, ACM coverage for the required subdomain pattern, and a Route53 ALIAS record; AC12 requires valid TLS. No regression.

previous_issues_status.original_issue: Contradiction between DixieStubTransport being hardcoded vs selected via DIXIE_BASE_URL
previous_issues_status.notes: FR-1 component table now states “Transport factory” with the same selection logic as AC6 and the Transport Factory section. Scope/Out-of-scope are aligned: factory implemented (stub+HTTP) but staging keeps DIXIE_BASE_URL unset so stub is used. Implementation notes also match (createDixieTransport(...)). This removes the non-implementable contradiction.

previous_issues_status.original_issue: CI E2E fix risk of false-green by creating empty dirs without defining required fixtures/behavior
previous_issues_status.notes: The PRD still requires minimal fixtures (.gitkeep), conditional/optional oracle directories, and AC19 graceful degradation when corpus is absent. No new ambiguity introduced.

previous_issues_status.original_issue: NFR performance targets not measurable / unclear whether S3/Redis are on request path
previous_issues_status.notes: Request-path constraints remain explicit (no synchronous S3; Redis best-effort with timeouts) and the p95 measurement method via routing duration histogram on staging remains defined.
